name: Climbing Harness
text: [FIT] + [exploration] (use 1 piton): Climb the terrain to choose an ascent. Then choose options equal to your effort (you may choose an option multiple times): Add 2[progress] to that ascent. Exhaust that ascent if it is a feature. Move your [ranger] to that ascent.

flavor: Oz gave you this pair of snowshoes after you helped him make a snowman outside the Terra Lodge. With a simple gesture, the soles of the snowshoes come alive, splitting into separate fragments held together by microgravitons.
name: Memlev Snowshoes
Nimbus Spirit
text: Friendly. Persistent. Unique. Spirit. [FOC] + [exploration]: Observe the weather patterns to add [progress] to this being equal to your effort. Then scout 1 path card.
sun_challenge: You may exhaust this spirit and discard 3[progress] from him to add 1 token to or discard 1 token from the weather.

flavor: All lives end, but we live on in the memories of those we leave behind. Though you never met this shaper in life, you'll forever hold the memory of his final manifestation in your mind.
name: Aspect of the Elk
text: Attach to a spirit or companion. Exhaust: Read the attached being or add 2[progress] to it.

flavor: You've still only scratched the surface of what this device is truly capable of.
name: Extraspatial Veil
text: Response: After the weather flips, add 1 shift to this gear. Use 1 shift: Before a challenge effect on the weather would resolve, cancel that effect.
